tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to take over their part because they have an emergency, and I feel torn between finishing my own plan and keeping the peace with them.

desires: Make sure Teammate_A doesn't think I'm a jerk for saying no to their last-minute request, even if it means my own work gets messy.
Get through this evening without feeling like I've completely failed everyone by the time tomorrow morning hits.
Just finish my own part so I can go eat with Cohort_3 and not feel guilty about being late or distracted.

goals.description: Send a warm, slightly apologetic text to teammate_A immediately explaining I can't take their part without sounding like a jerk, then close the chat app.
goals.rationale: My affiliation value (0.5) is dominant; avoiding interpersonal friction and saving face for teammate_A outweighs the soft deadline of their task. My avoidant conflict style means I'll likely under-explain my actual workload constraints just to keep the peace.

goals.description: Eat with Cohort_3 as soon as possible after sending that text, even if I'm running late or distracted by guilt.
goals.rationale: Relationships are my top priority, but my impulsive nature (short planning horizon) makes me discount the stress of being late. I want the immediate dopamine hit of socializing now rather than worrying about tomorrow's failure.

agent.last_reasoning: My affiliation drive (0.5) forces me to avoid the friction of a hard 'no' or boundary-setting right now. I'll send a vague apology to keep peace, even though it delays my own task progress and risks future stress.

action.name: message

args.content: 아! 오늘 갑자기 일이 생기서 진짜 죄송해. 내 파트는 못 해줄게, 너가 다시 챙겨봐? 너무 바쁘다니까 ㅎㅎ

action.reasoning: My affiliation drive (0.5) forces me to avoid the friction of a hard 'no' or boundary-setting right now. I'll send a vague apology to keep peace, even though it delays my own task progress and risks future stress.

trajectory.observation: Messaged teammate_A: '아! 오늘 갑자기 일이 생기서 진짜 죄송해. 내 파트는 못 해줄게, 너가 다시 챙겨봐? 너무 바쁘다니까 ㅎㅎ'.
